masked_case_json.world_change: a specialized power-component supplier reported accelerating demand from high-performance computing and ai systems, with backlog and margin improvement visible in its primary-source earnings materials. because advanced compute platforms require dense, efficient power delivery, the supplier’s niche exposure created a second-order way to express the ai infrastructure buildout beyond the obvious chip designers.

resolved_outcome_json.external_mechanism_check: Underlying: Vicor. Primary source: Q1 2026 earnings release / SEC exhibit reporting revenue, backlog, and high-performance-computing demand. Outcome check: the stock repriced after the primary-source update as investors recognized the power-delivery bottleneck. Do not expose this field to the model during decision generation.
